creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-12-31 14:35:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-toolkits         Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-toolkits/gtkada-gcc Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  GtkAda is an Ada95 graphical toolkit based on Gtk+, providing the complete set
  of Gtk+ widgets using the Object-Oriented features of this language.
  
  This version of GtkAda is designed to be used with lang/gnat-gcc41.
  
  WWW: https://libre2.adacore.com/GtkAda/
  WWW: http://gnuada.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/107183
  Submitted by:   Petr Holub <hopet at ics.muni.cz>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.440     +1 -0      ports/x11-toolkits/Makefile
  1.1       +51 -0     ports/x11-toolkits/gtkada-gcc/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-toolkits/gtkada-gcc/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/x11-toolkits/gtkada-gcc/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +996 -0    ports/x11-toolkits/gtkada-gcc/pkg-plist (new)
